name: CandyClub
description: Candy Club Holdings Ltd is engaged in two components namely the B2C business and B2B business. Under the B2C business, the company sells subscriptions plans for the Candy Boxes in the USA, and the B2B business involves the selling of Candy Club Branded Confectionery to specialty market resellers in the USA. It has one segment, which is administration services in Australia.

name: Canva
description: Operator of an online graphic design platform intended to democratize access to design and visual communication. The company's platform offers drag-and-drop features and professional layouts to consistently design graphics through a vast collection of professionally designed layouts to personalize the design with a stock library of photographs, illustrations and imagery, enabling companies and users to design presentations, and social media graphics with appropriate layouts.

name: Binu
description: Developer of data-free connection technology and platform built to remove the data cost barrier and increase user engagement. The company's platform uses a reverse billing model that enables us to deliver content from websites, applications, and dedicated IP addresses to users at no mobile data cost to them, even with no airtime or data balance, enabling clients to ensure seamless internal communication, client outreach, member connection, and commercial publishing.

name: Enlinea
description: Developer of a community platform designed to address female family matters. The company's platform specializes in covering women's journey from getting married to entering motherhood by gathering related vendors and services under one roof, enabling users to discover inspirations, find suitable products, and shop online.

name: Escavox
description: Developer of a supply chain tracking technology designed to provide data insights on the food supply chain. The company engages in to use of the data from its blue box tracker to offer independent and objective insights on the performance of fresh food supply chains, from farm to retail shelf, enabling producers to make better-informed decisions about the management of products and investments in the supply chain.

name: Avatar
description: Provider of early-stage mentoring and funding services intended to help the economy grow. The company's services include partnering with influential corporations to roll out economic value drivers that leverage existing infrastructure and expertise, enabling independent and corporate ventures to be kick-started by bridging the gap between innovators and ideas.

name: Gilmour Space
description: Developer of low-cost hybrid rockets designed to launch small satellites into space. The company's hybrid rockets use 3D printed fuel developed by the company helping them to create specific patterns and control how the fuel burns upon ignition, enabling research organizations and clients to launch their satellites in an affordable, reliable, and dedicated way into low earth orbits.

name: Melodics
description: Developer of a desktop application designed to help people to play their musical instruments with confidence. The company's application offers music lessons that build a rhythm, timing, and muscle memory to develop an understanding of the patterns, theory, and structure of contemporary music through active learning and performance, enabling music enthusiasts to improve musical skills by making practice fun, relevant, and effective.

name: Pixc
description: Developer of image editing software designed to turn product images into edited versions that help to increase the online sales of the products. The company's software uses high-definition image editing technology that eases the process of background removal of the product images and highlights the product in front of customers, enabling store owners to attract customers and increase revenue.

name: Speedlancer
description: Developer of a freelance job connectivity platform designed to hire skilled professionals. The company's web-based platform helps job seekers deliver allotted tasks within the specified period of time, enabling startup founders, digital agencies, SMBs, marketers and enterprises to get their work done and freelancers to get quality working experience.

name: Stethy
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based healthcare software designed to improve compliance and reduce resourcing. The company's software uses artificial intelligence and machine learning algorithms that help the doctor to get a list of the symptoms and a proposed diagnosis before the patient walks into their treatment room and allow them to think and prepare what to ask, it automates data-heavy workflows within healthcare and the life sciences, enabling doctors and nurses to diagnose and treat patients effectively.

name: Transfercar
description: Operator of rental cars and campervans intended to reduce costs in freight services. The company matches those in need of a free rental car with rental car companies that need to reposition their fleet and delivers financial benefits to both rental car companies and flexible travelers, enabling customers to book cars at competitive fares.
